metadata.description: A collection of reusable Claude Code skill plugins for common development workflows

plugins.name: brainstorm
plugins.description: Suggest the 5 most valuable next features or improvements for a project

plugins.name: changelog
plugins.description: Generate or update CHANGELOG.md from git history

plugins.name: document-project
plugins.description: Create or improve project documentation with README and /docs structure

plugins.name: find-breaking-rest-api
plugins.description: Find breaking changes in REST APIs by analyzing git history

plugins.name: find-dead-code
plugins.description: Find unused functions, classes, variables, and imports across languages

plugins.name: improve-logging
plugins.description: Audit logging quality and produce prioritized fix recommendations

plugins.name: task-agent
plugins.description: Read tasks from agent-tasks.yml, implement each via an agent, and open PRs

plugins.name: find-skills
plugins.description: Analyze the active repository and recommend relevant Claude Code skills from known marketplaces
